title: Ooglith masquer

An '''ooglith masquer''' was a creature [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to function as a full-body disguise to allow them to infiltrate other [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Description==
Ooglith masquers were [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] creatures employed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They allowed a Yuuzhan Vong to disguise themselves as a different [[Species/Legends|species]] to engage in deep-cover operations. Generally, masquers were used by the Yuuzhan Vong to pose as [[Human/Legends|Humans]], the species that most closely resembled them in size and shape.<ref name="RPG-Core" /> Masquers took on a specific appearance and could be reused many times.<ref name="EGTAS">''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|The Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> Masquers had to be specifically trained to remain in a certain form while covering the wearer's face.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|414|Ooglith}}</ref>

The ooglith masquer was closely related to the [[ooglith cloaker]].<ref name="RPG-Core" /> Resembling a blob of protoplasm, the masquer was draped over the head and torso of a Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="CSWE" /> Like the cloaker, masquers were painful to put on, with the masquer attaching to the wearer by inserting thousands of tiny tendrils into the pores of the skin. The masquer could be removed by pressing the hidden organ located near the nose.<ref name="RPG-Core" /> The creature's tendrils would withdraw from the body and peel away from the face, returning to a state of protoplasm for storage.<ref name="CSWE" />

A variant, the [[gablith masquer]], was developed that allowed the Yuuzhan Vong to disguise themselves as non-Human species such as the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]].<ref name="BP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref>

==History==
Masquers were used by the Yuuzhan Vong to conceal their identity, hiding their own face behind that of another individual or for older Yuuzhan Vong to appear younger. The Praetorite Vong wore masquers in this fashion, but by the time of the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] has all but stopped using masquers in a similar way for [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]. [[Onimi]] wore a masquer to disguise his [[Shamed Ones|shaming]] in his guise as Kae Kwaad,<ref name="EoVII">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref> whereas conversely, [[Nom Anor]] wore a masquer bearing the features of a Shamed One in his role as [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]].<ref name="FHII">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''</ref>

During the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], advance [[Agent/Legends|agents]] of the [[Praetorite Vong]] made extensive use of ooglith masquers. Both [[Nom Anor]] and [[Yomin Carr]] wore ooglith masquers to pose as [[Human/Legends|Humans]] during their infiltration missions.<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>

As the war with the Yuuzhan Vong escalated, a refugee camp was established on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Yuuzhan Vong warriors used ooglith masquers to disguise themselves as refugees to attack the camp from the inside.<ref name="DTI">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref>
